utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination – Prague (fully specified); (2) travel_dates – '2024-07-10 to 2024-07-14' (fully specified); (3) transportation – flight details and cost are included (fully specified); (4) accommodation – hotel name and cost are provided (fully specified); (5) activities – one activity with cost is provided (fully specified); (6) additional_services – details and cost are included (fully specified); (7) total_budget – includes total confirmed cost, original budget, and remaining balance (fully specified). All 7 items are included with details and costs where applicable.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final vacation package includes the destination 'Prague', transportation described as 'Flights booked as part of the travel package' costing €600, accommodation at 'Family Haven Hotel', and one activity 'City Walking Tour and Prague Zoo Visit'. The accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9. For activities, 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9 and 'Zoo' has a rating of 9. No additional services were included ('None'), so we omit that.
